# CWE-820: Missing Synchronization (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-820-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var visitMu sync.Mutex
var visitCounts = map[string]int{}

// Safe: mutex protects concurrent updates to the shared counter map.
func TrackVisit(c *gin.Context) {
	key := c.ClientIP()
	visitMu.Lock()
	visitCounts[key] = visitCounts[key] + 1
	count := visitCounts[key]
	visitMu.Unlock()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"visits": count})
}
